title: Heroism grants magic immunity while equipped

card.rawText: AL: +2. Hit: +2. Atk: +2. This card and the equipped creature are unaffected by magic cards. This card can only be negated when played.

plan.title: Heroism grants magic immunity while equipped
plan.summary: Equip Heroism and verify the headless route recognizes its printed magic immunity while it remains equipped.

notes: Equip Heroism to player_1 primary creature.

steps: Player 1 equips Heroism to their primary creature.
Accept the while-equipped magic immunity static rule.
manualVerification: Confirm future targeted magic effects cannot affect either Heroism or the equipped creature after Heroism resolves.
riskNotes: This fixture validates static-rule recognition, not a full opposing magic targeting attempt.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
